title: cleanup: retire legacy tinybird internal tokens
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Sweeping up the birdcage
gist.blurb: Polly did some spring cleaning in the observability nest, sweeping out old Tinybird tokens. Just keeping our internal metrics tidy and secure!
gist.summary: Removed legacy internal Tinybird append and read tokens from our observability configuration to match the live deployment state.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup ensures our metrics pipeline remains secure and perfectly synced with our live infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee cleaning up a tiny birdhouse (Tinybird metaphor) next to some glowing server racks or monitors showing data pipes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, using a small broom to sweep around a cute wooden birdhouse sitting on a retro server rack. The servers glow with soft lime green (#ecf874) lights. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
